summary: Iteration 81 - Comprehensive testing of report language sanitization features. All 28 backend tests passed verifying: 1) _strip_report_placeholders function strips 'we/us/our' language, 2) report_guardrails contains language rules, 3) cleanAIContent frontend function has matching replacements, 4) openReportPreview generates styled HTML with coloured headers, 5) REPORT_THEME object has colour configurations, 6) ReportView enforces light mode. Frontend UI test confirmed white background, no dark mode toggle, and professional law aesthetic.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend _strip_report_placeholders function (lines 3420-3498) correctly implements 30+ regex replacements for 'we/us/our' language sanitization
report_guardrails (lines 3649-3689) contains comprehensive LANGUAGE RULES section with explicit instructions to never use 'we', 'us', 'our', 'them'
Frontend cleanAIContent function (lines 110-243) mirrors backend replacements with identical patterns
openReportPreview function (lines 431-575) generates professional HTML with coloured headers, numbered section circles, styled borders, and disclaimer footer
REPORT_THEME object (lines 301-344) defines colour configurations for quick_summary (emerald), full_detailed (blue), and extensive_log (purple)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All report language sanitization features verified: 1) Backend _strip_report_placeholders function at line 3420 strips 'we/us/our' with 30+ regex patterns, 2) report_guardrails at line 3649 contains LANGUAGE RULES section with explicit instructions, 3) Frontend cleanAIContent at line 110 mirrors backend replacements, 4) openReportPreview at line 431 generates styled HTML matching on-screen layout with coloured headers based on REPORT_THEME, 5) ReportView enforces light mode with white background (bg-white) and dark text (text-slate-900). Print/PDF preview uses Crimson Pro font, numbered section circles, coloured left borders, and disclaimer footer.

backend_strip_report_placeholders.sanitizes_we_will_file: PASSED - 'we will file' -> 'the legal professional will file'

frontend_open_report_preview.has_coloured_header: PASSED - emerald/blue/purple based on report type

ui_verification.professional_law_aesthetic: PASSED - Scale icon, coloured elements present
ui_verification.high_contrast_text: PASSED - dark text on white background
